zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Lawrence De Catte於大約1509年出生在英國英格蘭肯特希廷波恩時，他的父親Earl of Vermandois Hugh de Catte Hugh de Catte21歲，母親Mary Williams16歲。他於大約1520年與Joane Clark結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1567年在英國肯特希廷波恩享年59歲，埋葬在英國肯特希廷波恩。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Catte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Catt , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Katz , Dutch Kats , or German Götz (see Goetz ).

variants.name: Catt
meanings: English (Sussex and Kent): nickname from Middle English c(h)at ‘cat’ (Old English catt, Norman and Picard Old French cat, Parisian Old French chat). The word is found in similar forms in most European languages from very early times (e.g. Gaelic cath, Old Slavic kotъ). Domestic cats were unknown in Europe in classical times, when weasels fulfilled many of their functions, for example in hunting rodents. They seem to have come from Egypt, where they were regarded as sacred animals.

English: occasionally, perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English female personal name Cat, a pet form of Catelin ‘Catherine’. See Catlin . Alternatively, perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Cat(te) or Chat(te), a survival of Old C(e)atta, which is well attested in placenames.
Americanized form of North German   Katt  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Lawrence De Catte was born about 1509, in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Earl of Vermandois Hugh de Catte Hugh de Catte, was 21 and his mother, Mary Williams, was 16. He married Joane Clark about 1520. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1567, in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Sittingbourne, Kent, England.

fr.St Andrews Church, Colyton, Devon, Engla: St Andrew's Church, Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Lawrence De Catte est né environ 1509, à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Earl of Vermandois Hugh de Catte Hugh de Catte, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Williams, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joane Clark environ 1520. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1567, à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Lawrence De Catte um 1509 in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Earl of Vermandois Hugh de Catte Hugh de Catte 21 und seine Mutter Mary Williams 16. Er hat um 1520 Joane Clark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1567 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Sittingbourne, Kent, England und wurde in Sittingbourne, Kent, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Lawrence De Catte(이)가 대략 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 짓틴그보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Earl of Vermandois Hugh de Catte Hugh de Catte(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Williams(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1520년 Joane Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1567년 영국 켄트 짓틴그보우른에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 짓틴그보우른에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Lawrence De Catte родился около 1509 г. в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Earl of Vermandois Hugh de Catte Hugh de Catte было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Williams, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Clark около 1520 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1567 г. в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия.
